pr.title: #1 on leaderboard: val_bpb=1.1574 — Int6 + MLP 3x + selective precision + optimized long-context training

output.summary: Selective fp16 passthrough atop int6 quantization frees budget for 3x MLP and 2048-token training, evaluated via stride-256 sliding windows.
techniques: Int6 per-row quantization with fp16 tied embedding and last-layer key passthrough
Triple-sized MLP hidden dim within 15.98MB artifact budget
Train at 2048 tokens with stride-256 sliding-window evaluation
